appraisal_events.evidence: Les mêmes défauts s'étaient au contraire exagérés chez Saniette... il pressait son débit... parvenait seulement, en les rendant inintelligibles, à sembler interminable... personne n'allait jusqu'à assumer... un éclat de rire... Saniette, désolé, restait seul à se sourire...
appraisal_events.explanation: Saniette is portrayed as increasingly ineffectual and socially awkward; his attempts at wit fail, he cannot command attention, and he retreats timidly from conflict.

status_effects.explanation: He is locally diminished as a speaker and companion; his discourse fails to engage others and marks him as socially weak.
